headline: Technological Investments & Acquisitions Aid Aptiv Amid Rising Costs
summary: APTV rides on electrification and smart mobility trends. Rising costs, weak demand and competition challenge its growth outlook.

headline: Why APTIV PLC (APTV) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
summary: APTIV PLC (APTV) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Aptiv, Lowers Price Target to $81
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Colin Langan   maintains Aptiv (NYSE:APTV) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $93 to $81.

headline: Aptiv Announces the Expiration and Final Results of Its Cash Tender Offer
